analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. Data fields (level, casting time, range, components, duration, classes) are present and standard.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is thorough, detailing shape/size variations, initial damage/save, persistent damage area (one side only), and scaling options.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (a small piece of phosphorus)
mechanics.persistent_damage: 5d8 (per turn ended within 10ft of one specified side or inside)
mechanics.scaling: Increases by 1d8 fire damage per slot level above 4th.

analysis.review_summary: The spell is well-defined. The distinction between the initial area damage and the persistent side damage is clear. The choice of which side deals damage adds a tactical element. The scaling is standard for damage spells.
